scripts.infra: echo Use Supabase CLI or SQL seed.sql to initialize your DB
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:triage" "npm run dev:progress" "npm run dev:exercise" "npm run dev:codereview" "npm run dev:concepts" "npm run dev:debug"
scripts.install:all: concurrently "cd frontend && npm install" "cd triage-service && pip install -r requirements.txt" "cd progress-service && pip install -r requirements.txt" "cd exercise-service && pip install -r requirements.txt" "cd codereview-service && pip install -r requirements.txt" "cd concepts-service && pip install -r requirements.txt" "cd debug-service && pip install -r requirements.txt"
